message:
fix(app,report): harden argument parsing against integer overflow and validate report inputs

Argument parsing (app.c):
- Add overflow guard to --seed parsing: check val > (UINT64_MAX - digit) / 10
  before accumulating, returning ASX_E_INVALID_ARGUMENT on overflow instead of
  silently wrapping

Report validation (report.c):
- Extract validate_doctor_report() and validate_evidence_sink() helpers that
  check for NULL and enforce capacity bounds (check_count <= MAX_CHECKS,
  count <= SINK_CAPACITY) before iterating
- All four report rendering functions (doctor_text, doctor_json, evidence_text,
  evidence_json) now validate inputs through the new helpers, returning
  ASX_E_INVALID_ARGUMENT for oversized counts that would read past array bounds

Tests:
- test_parse_args_seed_rejects_overflow: verifies 2^64 string is rejected
- test_doctor_render_rejects_oversized_check_count: verifies out-of-bounds
  check_count fails both text and JSON rendering
- test_evidence_render_rejects_oversized_count: same for evidence sink

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
